title: MimicWorld
description: Adds a clone of your fresh overworld for all your mining and world gen needs
body:
This mod adds a new dimension called The Mimic World which is a copy of the overworld before the player left their mark on it, this mod's main uses would be to be used as a mining dimension and can easily be reset by deleting the dimension file, this way if a pack updates and adds new overworld world gen you could go to the Mimic World and explore it without having to travel 500 chunks and 500 more.
For questions feel free to join my Discord.
